holdings.infoBox: DEM is an equity ETF with a total of 531 individual holdings. The top holdings are MediaTek stock at 6.79%, China Construction Bank at 4.17%, United Microelectronics at 2.58%, Industrial and Commercial Bank of China at 2.56%, and Saudi Arabian Oil Company at 1.82%.

overview.description: The WisdomTree Emerging Markets High Dividend Fund (DEM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high dividend yield equity. The fund tracks a dividend-weighted index of emerging market stocks ranked in the top 30% by dividend yield. DEM was launched on Jul 13, 2007 and is issued by WisdomTree.
